issue_title: Scrollbar doesn't work properly when ivy is enabled
issue_body_preview:
#### Reproduction
After enabling angular ivy, content inside of ng-scrollbar container disappear and scroll becomes immovable like in PRT_SC_2.png. It compiles correctly but doesn't work properly on browsers.    

Steps to reproduce:
1. Enable angular ivy 
 
#### Expected Behavior
The text sh
test_description_zh: 在启用 Angular Ivy 渲染引擎的项目中，打开包含 ng-scrollbar 组件的页面，观察 ng-scrollbar 容器内的内容是否正常显示，以及滚动条是否可以正常拖拽滚动。
expected_result_zh: ng-scrollbar 容器内的内容应正常可见显示，滚动条应可正常拖拽和滚动，页面内容随滚动条操作正确滚动。
